zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger De Boys於大約1376年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾康寧斯比時，他的父親John de Bois I48歲，母親Eustace Sandeby48歲。他於大約1399年與Margaret Jeningham在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1421年2月22日在法國皮卡迪索姆享年46歲。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Boys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .
Probably also an Americanized form of French   Bois  .

variants.name: Boyce
meanings: English and Irish (mainly Donegal): of Norman origin, a habitational name from from one or more places in Normandy named with Old French bois ‘wood, grove’, especially Bois-Arnault and Bus-Saint-Rémy (Eure), and Bosc-le-Hard (Seine-Maritime), each of which is known to have given its name to an aristocratic Norman family in England. The name was taken by the Normans from England to Ireland, where it was also adopted to Anglicize Irish Ó Buadhaigh (see Bogue ).
English: variant of Bush , influenced by Old French bois in 1 above, or else a translation of this term.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger De Boys was born about 1376, in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John de Bois I, was 48 and his mother, Eustace Sandeby, was 48. He married Margaret Jeningham about 1399, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 22 February 1421, in Somme, Picardie, France, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger De Boys est né environ 1376, à Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John de Bois I, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Eustace Sandeby, avait 48 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Jeningham environ 1399, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 22 février 1421, à Somme, Picardie, France, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger De Boys um 1376 in Coningsby, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Bois I 48 und seine Mutter Eustace Sandeby 48. Er hat um 1399 in Lincolnshire, England Margaret Jeningham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 22. Februar 1421 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Somme, Picardie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Boys è nato il circa 1376 nel Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John de Bois I, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Eustace Sandeby, aveva 48 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Jeningham circa 1399, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 febbraio 1421, nel Somme, Picardie, Francia, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger De Boysが約1376年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアコニングスビーで生まれた時，父John de Bois Iは48歳，母Eustace Sandebyは48歳であった。約1399年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでMargaret Jeninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1421年2月22日にフランスピカーディソンメで46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger De Boys(이)가 대략 1376년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 코닝스비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Bois I(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Eustace Sandeby(은)는 48세였다. 그는 대략 1399년 영국 링코실르에서 Margaret Jeningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1421년 2월 22일 프랑스 피카디 솜에서 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger De Boys nasceu aproximadamente 1376, em Coningsby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John de Bois I, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Eustace Sandeby, tinha 48 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Jeningham aproximadamente 1399, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 22 de fevereiro de 1421, em Somme, Picardie, França, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger De Boys родился около 1376 г. в местности конингсби, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John de Bois I было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Eustace Sandeby, 48. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Jeningham около 1399 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 22 февраля 1421 г. в местности сомм, пикарди, Франция в возрасте 46 лет.
